Precondition: box_1 is accessible and end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

Precondition: box_1 is grasped with end_effector_left and end_effector_right and there is space on the table to the right of box_2.
Postcondition: box_1 is placed on the table to the right of box_2.

Precondition: box_2 is accessible and end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
Postcondition: box_2 is grasped with end_effector_left and end_effector_right.
